chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI HCA 106 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal. 20.04.2026 Mr. Muhammad Ali, advocate holding brief for Mr. Ovais Ali Shah, advocate for the appellant. Learned counsel, under instructions, submits that appeal may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
